subject: Removing aai oxm files from configmaps
commit_message:
Removing aai oxm files from configmaps

-they have no parameterization, are huge files, and are breaching the configmap space
removing them and finding an alternate way of getting them into the containers
if they need to be externalized that can be done in a separate issue.
for now emptyDir{} is good enough.

Issue-ID: OOM-858

Change-Id: I05602302890dd3e0363dc355f1697b76fea509a1
Signed-off-by: Mandeep Khinda <mandeep.khinda@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 1:

I compared the v10 xml deleted file to the one present in the container. there are some added elements in the previously mapped file:
<java-type name="Vpe">
<java-type name="Vpes">

not sure on the implication of this..

Patch Set 1:

Hi Karen, This just means that the file we forked as a config map was out of sync with the source of truth for these files which is the aai project aai/test-config.  I think the implication might be that it works better? :P
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
